name: PB1 - IP Block via FortiGate
description: Extracts src_ip from incoming alert and creates an address object + deny policy on FortiGate via REST API. Triggered by Shuffle webhook receiving T-Pot or FortiGate logs.

trigger.description: Receives JSON events from T-Pot Logstash and SOAR Logstash pipelines

parameters.description: Extract the source IP from the incoming alert payload

actions.name: Add IP to Block Address Group

notes: Replace FORTIGATE_IP with your FortiGate management IP
Replace FORTIGATE_API_TOKEN with your FortiGate REST API token
Create address group 'SOAR-blocked-ips' in FortiGate and add to deny policy before activating
This playbook fires on EVERY incoming event — add IP validation/whitelist logic as needed
